h0e13c670g4fb4g4c60g8dabgfd795ff22211: Fools - oblivious to their quarry standing right before them. We've little cause for concern here.
h800f600dg7237g4d42gbc4bg5e2f3e78ffa6: Indeed. They're outmatched and they don't even know it.
h64bc9e86g20e7g48ffga8f9gd09d5ecd4309: Yes. That said, they have the numbers if not the guile. Best not linger amongst them.
